title: [kimi-review] 37223cc: [SEVERITY: medium] Unreviewable commit scope: one commit mix
description:
Commit: 37223ccd5
Message: fix: batch zephyr integration, test vectors, renode support and spec updates

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] Unreviewable commit scope: one commit mixes Zephyr firmware, C subsystems (OSCORE/EDHOC crypto, SCHC, transport), Rust crates, Python sim, Renode peripherals, CI, and 1000+ lines of spec changes (~7k insertions). Security-critical changes (e.g., `edhoc.c`, `hkdf.c`, `oscore.c`, `identity.rs`, `coap_keys.c`) are buried in a batch commit, making meaningful review and bisection nearly impossible. Recommend splitting.
